Shadow DMA Mode

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x94
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of FCR[3] (DMAM) allowing DMA mode change without rewriting FCR. Only present when FIFO_MODE and SHADOW are configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] sdmam rw 0x0 SDMAM

Field Descriptions

sdmam - SDMAM

Shadow DMA Mode. 0=DMA mode 0, 1=DMA mode 1.
